chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1329 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< On 02-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Record reflects that present petition was lastly fixed on 02.05.2023, and thereafter no efforts were made to proceed with the matter. Though the present petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution, however in the interest of justice and as a last chance, the matter is adjourned to 11.09.2025. Let notice be issued to the petitioner as well as his Counsel for the next date of hearing.” Today, none present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Though intimation notice was issued to Counsel for the Petitioner. The instant Constitutional petition is pending without any useful progress. The absence on the part of the petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
